overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a medieval-style cottage interior, moving from a rustic kitchen through a dining area into a cozy living room with a lit fireplace. The environment features stone walls, wooden furniture, and warm artificial lighting from candles, lamps, and the fire.

scene_state.functional_zone: rustic kitchen with stone walls and wooden prep tables

agents.ego_description: walking slowly through the kitchen area, passing wooden tables and a stone stove while moving toward the dining space

entered.detail: long wooden prep table with worn surface and lower shelves
large stone cooking stove with metal kettle on top
two green metal buckets with handles sitting on the floor
circular wooden dining table with pedestal base
simple wooden chairs with spindle backs around the dining table

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a rustic kitchen with stone walls and wooden flooring. A long wooden prep table dominates the center, with green buckets on the floor nearby. The camera moves forward, revealing a round dining table with chairs against the left wall, and a large stone stove visible to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition through doorway to cozy living room seating area

events.description: passing through wooden doorway from kitchen into the living room area

agents.ego_description: moving through the wooden doorway frame into the living room, approaching the seating area with armchairs and sofa

entered.detail: thick wooden door frame separating kitchen from living room
upholstered armchair with tufted back and wooden legs
tall brass floor lamp with stained glass shade
three-seat sofa with patterned upholstery and rolled arms
wooden wall shelves holding books and glass jars

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through a thick wooden doorway, transitioning from the kitchen into a cozy living room. The space features a tufted armchair, an antique floor lamp with a stained glass shade, and a patterned sofa against the stone walls. Bookshelves mounted on the wall hold various items, and a circular rug covers the wooden floor.

scene_state.functional_zone: living room fireplace area with burning fire

events.description: firelight becomes the dominant warm light source as the camera approaches the hearth

agents.ego_description: slowing down to approach the stone fireplace, focusing on the burning fire and cooking pot

entered.detail: large stone fireplace with brick interior and stone arch surround
active fire burning on the hearth with visible flames
wooden crate filled with chopped firewood
straw broom leaning against the wall

segments.scene_description: The final segment focuses on the stone fireplace at the far end of the living room. The camera approaches the hearth where a fire burns brightly, illuminating a cooking pot suspended over the flames. A wood box sits to the right of the fireplace, while the patterned sofa is now visible to the left. The warm firelight dominates the lighting as the camera comes to rest facing the flames.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a rustic, functional kitchen into a warm and cozy living room centered around a glowing hearth. It begins by gliding past a long wooden prep table and green buckets on a stone floor, moving forward to reveal a round dining table and a large stone stove. As the camera passes through a thick wooden doorway, the environment shifts into a comfortable lounge featuring a tufted armchair, a stained glass floor lamp, and bookshelves mounted against the stone walls. The scene then narrows its focus toward the far end of the room, passing a circular rug and a patterned sofa before approaching the stone fireplace. Finally, the camera comes to rest facing the bright flames of the hearth, where a cooking pot hangs suspended and the warm firelight dominates the space.
